task_name: Add New AI Image Provider to Vercel AI SDK

plan_metrics.plan_content:
Here is my complete plan for implementing the `@ai-sdk/pixelart` provider. The plan file has been written to `/Users/timpietrusky/.claude/plans/polished-wiggling-boole.md`.

## Summary

### 9 new files — all in `packages/pixelart/`, nothing else touched

**Build/Config files:**
- `package.json` — `@ai-sdk/pixelart` package config with workspace dependencies on `@ai-sdk/provider` and `@ai-sdk/provider-utils`
- `tsconfig.json` — TypeScript composite config with project references to `../provider` and `../provider-utils`
- `tsconfig.build.json` — Disables `composite` for tsup builds
- `tsup.config.ts` — Produces dual CJS + ESM bundles with `.d.ts` declaration files

**Source files:**
- `src/pixelart-config.ts` — Internal config type (`provider`, `url`, `headers`, `fetch`)
- `src/pixelart-image-settings.ts` — `PixelArtImageModelId` union type + `PixelArtImageSettings` interface with `size`, `style` (`"pixel" | "retro" | "8bit"`), and `pixelDensity`
- `src/pixelart-image-model.ts` — `PixelArtImageModel` class implementing `ImageModelV3`, POSTs to `https://api.pixelart.ai/v1/images/generations`, emits warnings for unsupported features (`aspectRatio`, `seed`, `files`, `mask`)
- `src/pixelart-provider.ts` — `createPixelArt()` factory, `PixelArtProvider` interface (image-only, no `ProviderV3` extension), default `pixelart` export
- `src/index.ts` — Public exports: factory function, provider type, model ID type, settings type

### Key design decisions
- Image-only provider: no `languageModel`, `embedding`, or speech methods
- Settings can be set at model construction time AND overridden per-call via `providerOptions.pixelart`
- Unsupported features emit `SharedV3Warning` (not errors) to follow SDK conventions
- Reuses standard `@ai-sdk/provider-utils` HTTP/header/API-key utilities throughout
